invitation.page.access_info: By accepting the invitation, you will have full access to the organization's resources according to your role.
invitation.page.auth_required: You need to be authenticated to accept the invitation.
invitation.page.hello_user: Hello :name, you have received an invitation to join an organization.
invitation.page.invalid_description: The invitation link you accessed is invalid or has expired.
invitation.page.received_invite: You have received an invitation to join an organization.
